page_title: Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi (Novel)
text:
is a novelization written by Shuka Matsuda of the web drama prequel to the live-action movies.

Plot

A novelization of Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi, the spin-off of the live-action movies. In Hans' chapter, Izuru takes a peek into the secret of Hans' research on Titans. Sasha's chapter will reveal her unknown, gloomy side. In Fukushi and Lil's chapter, their feelings clash and result in a fierce battle. What are the "three keys" to the destruction of Titans that were not featured in the movies?

Summary

1. The Strike Back Begins

2. The Arrow of Hope

3. The Departure to Freedom
